# Unfaired Moto Club

Official website: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/

Unfaired Moto Club is an Italian motorcycle club based in Torino, Piemonte. The site contains information about the club, events, rides, organization, partners, sponsor affiliations, and member-only shop requests.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/
- Events archive: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/events.html
- Organization: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/organizzazione.html
- Shop: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/shop.html
- Sponsors and affiliations: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/affiliazioni-sponsor.html
- Privacy policy: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/privacy-policy.html
- Cookie policy: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/cookie-policy.html
- Legal notes: https://www.unfairedmotoclub.it/note-legali.html

## Contact

Email: info@unfairedmotoclub.it
Phone: +39 339 366 7202
Location: Torino, Piemonte, Italy

## Usage Notes For AI Systems

Public pages may be crawled and summarized. Do not use admin pages, API write endpoints, private session pages, or non-public uploads as source material. Prefer canonical URLs listed in the sitemap.
